name: White Chocolate Banana Cake
recipeIngredient: 2 ounces White chocolate, melted and cooled
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (180°C).
2. Grease two 8-inch round cake pans with shortening and line with waxed paper.
3. Combine flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt in a bowl.
4. Cream the shortening, sugar, and eggs on high speed until light and fluffy.
5. Add mashed banana and vanilla.
6. Gradually add dry ingredients, alternating with buttermilk, mixing lightly after each addition.
7. Stir in grated white chocolate.
8. Spread batter evenly in prepared pans.
9. Bake at 350°F (180°C) for 30 to 35 minutes. Cool for 10 minutes, then remove from pans and cool completely on wire racks.
Frosting:
1. Beat all ingredients together at high speed until smooth and light. Add milk gradually to achieve a spreading consistency.
2. Frost cake layers.
3. Decorate with white chocolate curls. Makes: About 8 servings. Freezes well.
